column_values.text_2_Mjj2yQkE: Classic / softer instrumentals Soft, timeless, and calming tracks that work best for slower, more polished edits. This is a strong fit for interior unit tours, detail shots, model walkthroughs, and content focused on the more relaxed side of Wylden. It helps the community feel comfortable, elevated, and peaceful without feeling too formal.  Pop / feel-good lifestyle Bright, upbeat, and approachable tracks that work well for everyday lifestyle content. This is a great fit for pool moments, resident-style clips, social spaces, pet-friendly content, and general community highlights. Pop music helps Wylden feel fresh, welcoming, and easy to connect with.  Country / outdoor lifestyle Warm, grounded, and lifestyle-driven tracks that pair well with Wylden’s trail access, outdoor amenities, and relaxed Tampa living. This is a strong fit for content that showcases walks, wellness, sunshine, weekend energy, and the active lifestyle surrounding the community. It gives the brand a more local, approachable, and down-to-earth feel.  Electronic / energetic modern Clean, rhythmic, and upbeat tracks that work best for more energetic edits. This is a great fit for work-from-home content, day-in-the-life videos, gym edits, morning routine clips, and faster-paced lifestyle storytelling. Electronic music helps Wylden feel modern, active, and connected to the rhythm of daily life.
column_values.text_2_Mjj2PJRM: Title: BN BERGEN Copy: Interstate Regular
column_values.long_text_Mjj24ZDl:
Wylden is a modern apartment community located in Citrus Park, Florida, designed for residents who want a balance of comfort, wellness, convenience, and everyday connection. The community offers a polished residential experience with thoughtfully designed apartment homes, lifestyle-focused amenities, and easy access to the surrounding Tampa Bay area.

Wylden’s brand should feel elevated but approachable, showcasing the ease of suburban Tampa living while still highlighting the energy of an active, connected lifestyle. With access to outdoor recreation, wellness-driven amenities, social spaces, and nearby shopping, dining, and entertainment, Wylden appeals to residents who want more than just a place to live — they want a home that supports their lifestyle.

From a marketing perspective, Wylden’s content should focus on storytelling around daily life at the community: peaceful interiors, morning routines, trail access, pool days, fitness, work-from-home moments, pet-friendly living, and local Citrus Park convenience. The overall positioning should make Wylden feel fresh, livable, and lifestyle-driven, while reinforcing it as a modern apartment destination for renters who value comfort, connection, and convenience.

column_values.long_text_Mjj24ZDl:
Note logo outros with Scarano deliverables: I want a PNG overlaid a gaussian blurred clip as the outro card always.
___

Scarano Marine is a globally trusted marine service provider specializing in high-performance engine maintenance and technical support for luxury vessels. As an authorized dealer for MAN Engines and John Deere, the company operates at the highest level of the industry—working directly with leading yacht builders and servicing vessels both pre- and post-delivery.
With a reputation built on precision, reliability, and consistency, Scarano Marine supports a wide range of clients—from private owners to major manufacturers such as Sunseeker, Azimut, Princess, and Sanlorenzo. Their work spans across the globe, reflecting both the scale of their operation and the level of trust placed in their team.
Despite this reach, Scarano Marine maintains a hands-on, client-first approach. As a family-operated business, they prioritize clear communication, attention to detail, and long-term relationships—ensuring every vessel receives the same level of care, regardless of scope or location.
Operationally, the company is defined by professionalism at every touchpoint. From uniformed, highly trained technicians to fully equipped service vehicles and streamlined communication, Scarano Marine delivers a level of organization and execution that aligns with the expectations of the luxury marine space.
Internally, they’ve built a strong culture centered around respect, growth, and pride in the work—an important factor in attracting and retaining top-tier technicians in a competitive industry.
With a consistent 5-star reputation and a track record of servicing some of the most respected names in yachting, Scarano Marine stands as a leader in marine service—now extending that same standard of excellence into the digital space.
column_values.long_text9qcmxe7t:
from client:

As a Dealer, we are situated at the top of the pyramid. Hence we are looking
for customers at the top and a few steps below. These are extremely
wealthy customers that have no problem paying for premium service. We
want customers that value the dealer and seek the dealer to work on their
vessels. Customers that just want it done right no matter the costs. They

value the yacht they have and seek out professional care. We no longer
work on older vessels that are patched together with a limited budget or
customers that just want it done for as cheap as possible. In a simple
version, we want the customers who take their Ferraris to the dealership,
not Jiffy lube. Our industry age range has always been older (50+) for
financial reasons. Now in 2026, older millennials are starting to come into
yacht ownership. One of our goal is to prepare our Instagram page for this
new generation of owners who value Instagram more than what their
parents may have.

Phallon knows our overall look & feel but we want this to be targeted to someone considering a Princess Yacht. We always aim at creating FOMO - we want to show the lifestyle and what they're missing out on. true wow factors. jaw dropping moments. lifestyle.

column_values.text_2_Mjj2yQkE: Surroundings Group: Rufus esque/House/Chill Wave/Luxury | Surroundings Official: Relevant trending audios with luxury sound
column_values.long_text_Mjj24ZDl:
Surroundings Group is a premium creative agency specializing in high-end real estate, lifestyle, marine, and hospitality content. The agency operates at the intersection of design, storytelling, and strategy—helping developers, builders, architects, property managers, and luxury lifestyle brands elevate their digital presence through world-class visuals and structured, measurable marketing execution.
With a strong foundation in video production, photography, brand strategy, and social media management, Surroundings Group has built a reputation for delivering polished, detail-driven creative that reflects the high-value environments we represent.
Core Services
Surroundings Group provides a full content + strategy ecosystem:
1. Video Production & Photography
Property walkthroughs
Lifestyle content
Aerial drone capture
Event coverage
Branded storytelling visuals
Micro-content verticals for social
2. Social Media Management
Content calendars (HeyOrca)
Copywriting + scheduling
Community engagement
High-performing content strategy
KPI tracking + analytics
3. Branding & Creative Direction
Brand kits
Messaging frameworks
Visual direction
Template systems
On-screen typography & design standards
4. Marketing Strategy
Campaign concepts
Product launches
Quarterly reviews and optimization
Growth pathways
Paid social collaboration (as needed)
column_values.long_text9qcmxe7t:
1. Client Audience (Who We Serve)
These are the people and companies that actually hire Surroundings Group.
• Real Estate Developers & Builders
High-value projects needing premium visuals and consistent marketing.
• Multi-Family Communities / Property Managers
Class A buildings requiring monthly content, leasing support, and amenity storytelling.
• Luxury Real Estate Agents & Brokerages
Require cinematic listing videos and brand-level creative to stand out.
• Architecture / Interior Design Firms
Craftsmanship-focused visuals that reflect design intent.
• Marine, Aviation, and Lifestyle Brands
Looking for elevated content across yachts, aircraft, and luxury experiences.
• Hospitality & Event Brands
Premium event coverage and destination marketing.
2. Social Audience (Who Follows & Engages With SG Online)
This audience may not hire you immediately, but they build visibility, credibility, and referrals.
• Creatives & Content Professionals
Videographers, photographers, editors, designers who admire the work.
• Real Estate Professionals
Agents, developers, property managers consuming inspiration + trends.
• Builders, Designers, and Trades
Interested in craftsmanship, architecture highlights, and behind-the-scenes processes.
• Luxury Lifestyle Enthusiasts
People who love premium homes, interiors, yachts, and high-end experiences.
• Aspiring Creators / Students
Looking to learn from BTS content, tips, and process posts.
• Community Members & Local Followers
Tampa Bay, Florida, and regional audiences curious about new properties and events.

column_values.long_text_Mjj24ZDl:
Global Jet Sales is a boutique private jet brokerage known for its hands-on approach, deep industry expertise, and unwavering commitment to client relationships. Family-owned and operated since 1976, the firm has facilitated over $7 billion in aircraft transactions, specializing in Gulfstream, Dassault Falcon, and Bombardier jets.

With 20+ years of direct transactional experience and a forward-thinking team that embraces digital trends, Global Jet Sales brings a fresh yet grounded approach to the luxury aviation market. Unlike larger firms, their advisors are non-territorial and highly collaborative, allowing the team to focus solely on what’s best for the client—not on internal competition.

Relationships are everything at Global Jet Sales. From the first call to final delivery, the team takes pride in being high-touch, accessible, and trusted—serving as long-term advisors, not just brokers. Their younger, trend-aware team ensures that the brand stays relevant and responsive to evolving buyer behaviors in a digitally driven world.

Global Jet Sales isn’t just about aircraft transactions—they're about building trust, delivering excellence, and creating lifelong client relationships.
column_values.long_text9qcmxe7t:
1. Ultra-High-Net-Worth Individuals
Entrepreneurs, investors, and celebrities
Looking for private, luxury travel and trusted advisors

2. Business Owners & Executives
Use jets for work and efficiency
Want reliable, discreet service

3. Younger First-Time Buyers
Often from tech or fast-growing industries
Appreciate modern, hands-on, and trend-aware service

4. Repeat Jet Owners
Looking to upgrade or sell
Value experience and honest guidance

5. Family Offices & Wealth Advisors
Manage purchases for wealthy clients
Need a reputable, relationship-driven brokerage

column_values.long_text_Mjj24ZDl:
VIV is a modern luxury apartment development located in St. Petersburg’s EDGE District. Built by Belpointe OZ, the project features two 15-story towers with 269 residential units ranging from studios to three bedrooms. The property includes a 355-space parking garage and about 15,000 square feet of ground-level retail space designed to add vibrancy to the district.
VIV emphasizes upscale urban living with amenities such as a pool deck, fitness center, and resident lounge. Construction is nearly complete, with leasing expected to begin in late 2025. Positioned in one of St. Pete’s fastest-growing neighborhoods, VIV reflects the city’s shift toward walkable, mixed-use developments blending lifestyle, community, and modern design.

column_values.long_text_Mjj24ZDl:
Location: 15560 Render Way, Nokomis, FL 34275 — nestled between downtown Sarasota and Venice. Developed by Crescent Communities in partnership with FCP on a 19.5-acre parcel.
Residences: Offers 450 mid-market one‑, two‑, and three‑bedroom apartment homes, with coastal-inspired design, smart layouts (like built-in mudrooms, home office space, closet systems), and modern finishes like granite counters and stainless appliances.
Amenities: Resort-style facilities including a heated saltwater pool, fitness center, yoga lawn, clubroom with coworking lounges, outdoor kitchens and grilling stations, pet-friendly dog park, EV charging, bike storage, and package delivery rooms. Residents enjoy exclusive direct access to the Legacy Trail just steps from the door.
Community & Location: Blends peaceful suburban living with proximity to Nokomis Village, Venice and Sarasota downtown areas, beaches (like Siesta Key and Nokomis Beach), Oscar Scherer State Park, golf, shopping, and dining. Move-in promotions have included up to 8 weeks of free rent and other incentives.


RENDER Legacy Trail is a residential apartment community purposefully built adjacent to the Legacy Trail, targeting residents who value immediate outdoor access for biking, walking, or commuting. With direct trail frontage and high-end amenities, it merges lifestyle, mobility, and design in a single community.
Meanwhile, the Legacy Trail itself is a regional public amenity—open to all—for recreation and alternative transit across Sarasota County, continually growing and being linked to broader statewide trail systems.
column_values.long_text9qcmxe7t:
Target Audience for RENDER Legacy Trail
Active Young Professionals & Remote Workers
Ages 25–40, seeking modern apartments with amenities like coworking spaces, EV charging, and fitness areas.
Value access to the Legacy Trail for biking, running, or commuting.
Lifestyle-Driven Couples & Singles
Health-conscious renters who want resort-style living close to beaches, parks, and downtown areas.
Drawn to low-maintenance living with upscale, functional design.
Empty Nesters & Pre-Retirees
Downsizing but still want comfort, convenience, and access to nature.
Attracted to the quiet surroundings and proximity to Sarasota and Venice.

🏙 Client Overview: Aster & Links
Type: Luxury mixed-use apartment community
Developer: Belpointe OZ
Location: Downtown Sarasota, FL (Main Street)
Scale: Two 10-story buildings, ~420+ units, ~50–60K sq ft retail

✨ Key Selling Points
Luxury Living: Condo-level finishes (quartz counters, smart tech, large terraces) in rental format.
Amenities: Rooftop lounges, wellness studios, pools, co-working, concierge, curated retail.
Design: Two distinct aesthetics — Aster (timeless, elegant) and Links (modern, industrial).
Public Art Integration: 15-ft sculpture “Touch” at entry.
Awards: 2025 Aurora Awards for Best Mixed-Use & Best Multifamily Community.
🎯 Value Proposition
High-end, walkable urban lifestyle in downtown Sarasota.
Luxury rental experience without ownership commitment.
Integrated live-work-play hub with retail convenience ( Isabel Boutique, SkinSpirit, etc)

⚠ Challenges
Lease-up speed (currently ~1/3 leased as of 2025).
Market sensitivity to luxury rental pricing.
High amenity and service expectations to maintain differentiation.

column_values.long_text_Mjj24ZDl:
Northhaven is a luxury apartment community in Sanford, FL, offering 1–3 bedroom residences with high-end finishes, smart home features, and resort-style amenities. Interiors feature designer kitchens with quartz countertops and Samsung appliances, in-unit washers/dryers, private balconies, and modern bathrooms designed for comfort and style.
Community amenities include a saltwater heated pool with cabanas, outdoor lounge and grilling areas, a 3,000 sq ft fitness center with yoga and Peloton spaces, coworking center, clubroom, walking trails, and pet-friendly facilities including a large dog park and pet spa. Sustainability is integrated through green building certification and EV charging stations.
column_values.long_text9qcmxe7t:
Target Audiences:
Young professionals & remote workers: Drawn to coworking spaces, fitness amenities, and stylish interiors.
Small families & couples: Seek spacious units, safe neighborhoods, and nearby schools/parks.
Pet owners: Attracted to dog park, pet spa, and walking trails.
Lifestyle seekers/social renters: Interested in social spaces, resort-style amenities, and modern design.
Eco-conscious renters: Value sustainable building practices and energy-efficient features.
Northhaven’s positioning emphasizes lifestyle, wellness, community, and convenience—making everyday living feel like resort living, whether at work, at home, or enjoying the property’s amenities.

column_values.text_2_Mjj2yQkE: Fun + Beachy - Nothing too "high end Miami"
column_values.long_text_Mjj24ZDl:
Arcadia 331 is a new luxury apartment community in Freeport, Florida, minutes from Destin, 30A, and Santa Rosa Beach. It blends modern design with coastal calm, giving residents an elevated yet relaxed lifestyle close to the Gulf.
Positioning: The calm between coastlines.
Design: Light-filled, modern coastal interiors with natural textures and clean lines.
Amenities: Resort-style pool, fitness center, clubhouse, pet spa + dog wash, co-working lounges, and modern smart-home units.
Location: Walkable to local spots like Sip Studio, In the Bar, and Birdy A, with quick access to 30A’s beaches and restaurants.
Content Tone: Bright, airy, and aspirational — focus on wellness, pets, local culture, and coastal connection.
column_values.long_text9qcmxe7t: Audience: Young professionals, families, and retirees seeking 30A’s lifestyle without the crowds or price tag. 25-55 y/o

column_values.long_text_Mjj24ZDl:
Creative Direction: Surf/Ski Euphoric Vibe
-We want the tone of the video content to reflect the cinematic, immersive feeling you get from high-end surf and ski films. Think expansive, awe-inspiring, emotional — not overly commercial or fast-paced — but more experiential and sensory-driven.

Mood/Feeling
-Euphoric and free — capturing the natural beauty of the ocean, the craftsmanship of the boat, and the excitement of the event.
-Immersive and cinematic — slow-motion shots, natural light, organic movement.
-Elegant but approachable — polished and refined without feeling staged or corporate.

Pacing
-Intentional and rhythmic — not a quick highlight reel but a smooth, flowing experience.
-Mix of slow motion and real-time — build a sense of presence and emotion.

Music
-Cinematic indie-electronic or ambient — think atmospheric, minimal vocals (if any), slow builds that mirror the motion of the water.
-Mood > Beat — the soundtrack should feel like it’s elevating the imagery, not overpowering it.

Fonts/Graphics
-Clean and modern — minimal sans-serif fonts (e.g., Montserrat, Raleway) that reflect a luxury, understated brand aesthetic.
-Simple lower-thirds or title cards — no flashy transitions, just smooth fades or minimalist motion.

Built for Adventure. Engineered for Life on the Water.

Born in the rugged Pacific Northwest, Burnewiin designs premium marine accessories and boat mounting systems for people who live to explore, fish, and play on the water. Whether you're offshore chasing tuna, cruising the Inside Passage, or relaxing at the sandbar with friends, Burnewiin gives you the freedom to quickly adapt your boat setup for every adventure. From the calm waters of Florida to the wilds of Alaska and every waterway in between, Burnewiin provides flexibility to your boat, and the way you spend time on it, like no other brand out there.

Our interchangeable marine system is engineered for versatility — allowing boat owners to easily switch between fishing, crabbing, shrimping, or simply enjoying a sunset cruise. Whatever your day on the water looks like, Burnewiin helps you "Wiin" it.

Why Choose Burnewiin Marine Accessories?

Fast, Secure, & Versatile Mounting System
Premium Rod Holders, Tables, Cutting Boards, and More
Built for Fishing, Cruising, Entertaining & Storage
Trusted by Guides, Anglers & Boating Enthusiasts
Designed & Tested in the rugged waters of the Pacific Northwest
Burnewiin marine products are crafted with purpose, blending old-world craftsmanship with modern innovation. Every detail is engineered for performance, durability, and style.

What Does Burnewiin Mean?

The name Burnewiin comes from a Gaelic word meaning "blacksmith" or "craftsman" — a nod to quality, durability, and mastery of design. It also echoes "burn the wind", symbolizing the powerful fire at the heart of the blacksmith’s forge.

This spirit drives everything we create — from rugged rod holders to our innovative mounting solution that’s built to last.

column_values.long_text_Mjj24ZDl: Darth Craft is a creative brand focused on designing and producing innovative small boats for children. The company combines safety, fun, and modern design to provide kids with an exciting first experience on the water. With attention to detail, durable materials, and a playful yet premium aesthetic, Darth Craft aims to inspire adventure and creativity while building lasting memories for families.
column_values.long_text9qcmxe7t:
B2B: Primary audience includes distributors, resorts, yacht clubs, marinas, and sport rental companies seeking premium recreational products for children. These partners value innovative, reliable, and attractive solutions that enhance their service offerings and generate additional revenue streams.

B2C (through distributors): Secondary audience includes high-income parents, yacht and boat owners, and families with an interest in premium leisure activities. This demographic values exclusivity, quality, and unique recreational experiences for their children.

column_values.long_text_Mjj24ZDl: At last year’s Cannes Yachting Festival, the Majesty 100 Terrace was unveiled as a bold new concept, a fresh interpretation of one of the brand’s most successful superyachts. In less than twelve months, that vision has been brought to life, and 2025 marks her highly anticipated European debut in full form. This milestone reflects not only design innovation but also the shipyard’s ability to turn concept into reality at remarkable speed. Alongside her, the award-winning Majesty 120 will be displayed, offering visitors a chance to experience two flagship models in one location. Content captured should serve as a tribute to this achievement -  cinematic, engaging, and designed to draw crowds onboard, conveying the excitement, pride, and prestige behind this launch.

column_values.long_text_Mjj24ZDl:
Hertz Marine is the Elettromedia S.p.A. brand dedicated to premium audio solutions designed exclusively for the marine environment. Every product is built to deliver outstanding sound while enduring the most demanding conditions on the water.

The Hertz Marine portfolio includes speakers, subwoofers, amplifiers, and accessories engineered and tested for resistance to saltwater, UV rays, humidity, vibrations, and extreme temperature shifts. Combining advanced engineering, refined design, and durable materials, the brand ensures powerful, crystal-clear, and immersive sound that lasts over time.

Hertz Marine speaks to boat owners, shipyards, and marine enthusiasts who demand superior audio experiences without compromising reliability. Through initiatives such as the Hertz Marine Sound Experience, the brand emphasizes creating unforgettable moments on board—whether relaxing in the harbor, enjoying water sports, or entertaining on deck.

With an established global presence, Hertz Marine consistently demonstrates leadership in premium marine audio at key industry events such as IBEX, METSTRADE, and the Miami Boat Show, strengthening its reputation as a trusted reference for outstanding sound at sea.
column_values.long_text9qcmxe7t:
Gender
Primarily male, with a growing share of female boaters, especially couples and families who see boating as a social and lifestyle experience.

Age
	•	Core target: 30–55 years old
	•	Younger segment: 25–35, early adopters focused on entertainment and watersports.
	•	Mature segment: 55–65, affluent boat owners seeking premium comfort and reliability.

Demographic
	•	Geography: United States, with strong presence in Florida, California, Texas, the Great Lakes, and the Northeast Atlantic coast.
	•	Income: Upper-middle to high household income (100K+ USD), including boat owners and watersports enthusiasts, often with a second home near the water.
	•	Lifestyle: Quality-driven, tech-oriented, and design-conscious. They value premium experiences on board, whether for relaxation, entertainment, or social gatherings.
	•	Key segments:
	•	Boat Owners & Enthusiasts (sport boats, pontoons, fishing boats, luxury yachts).
	•	Watersports Community (wakeboarding, wakesurfing, jet skiing).
	•	Premium Lifestyle Seekers who view boating as a status symbol and a way to enjoy exclusive experiences with friends and family.

column_values.long_text_Mjj24ZDl: Cantiere del Pardo is a leading Italian yacht builder with over 50 years of experience in crafting premium sailing and motor yachts. Pardo Yachts, one of its flagship brands, represents elegance, innovation, and performance in the luxury motor yacht segment. With a strong focus on design, functionality, and long-range cruising capabilities, Pardo Yachts offers timeless aesthetics and cutting-edge engineering, entirely Made in Italy. The brand is positioned in the high-end market and is known for its seamless indoor-outdoor layouts, refined onboard lifestyle, and commitment to sustainable excellence.
column_values.long_text9qcmxe7t: Affluent men and women, aged 40–65, primarily entrepreneurs, investors, or top-level professionals with a strong appreciation for Italian design, innovation, and premium lifestyle experiences. The audience includes both existing yacht owners looking to upgrade to a more spacious and autonomous model, and new buyers entering the 70+ foot category. Geographically focused on Europe and the United States. Discerning, design-savvy individuals who value quality, craftsmanship, and elegance — both at sea and on land.

column_values.long_text_Mjj24ZDl:
Global Superyacht Forum Miami is a high-level, international gathering designed for senior decision-makers in the superyacht industry. The event positions Miami as a strategic bridge between U.S. capital and global yacht production and ownership.

This promo video should reflect that positioning: elevated but natural, globally relevant, and aligned with Miami’s premium yet relaxed energy. The tone should feel confident and conversational rather than corporate or sales-driven.

We are aiming for a cinematic but natural feel — Morgan walking casually in Miami (waterfront / urban luxury setting), speaking directly to camera. Intercut with B-roll of Faena (evening elegance), W South Beach (modern strategic forum setting) and drone footage of beach/boats/marina.

The vibe should feel premium, global, confident, and relaxed: Miami light, movement, warm tones.  clean, modern, and internationally credible with subtle luxury cues.

Duration: max 60 seconds.
Objective: create clarity, credibility, and global appeal.

From 39 to 78 feet, over 6,300 Riviera motor yachts are today cruising the great waterways of the world. Our passion is creating the ultimate boating experience; a unique synergy of blue-water heritage, engineering excellence, enduring quality, innovative design, supreme luxury and smart technology that makes boating with Riviera easier and more pleasurable. And every magnificent Riviera is built to last, backed by industry leading warranties and the reassurance of our global support network.

column_values.long_text_Mjj24ZDl:
There is a difference between building yachts and creating them. At Galeon, we see yachting as an art form - a delicate balance between freedom and form. Our mission is not to deliver products, but to shape vessels that carry meaning, identity and emotion. Every yacht is a dialogue - between the owner’s vision and our craftsmanship, between timeless elegance and
forward-thinking design. True luxury lies not in abundance, but in the ability to choose, to define your own course, to make the sea feel like home.

Meyer Shank Racing (MSR) is a top-tier American professional motorsports organization co-owned by Mike Shank and Jim Meyer, competing in the IndyCar Series and IMSA SportsCar Championship. Known for winning the 2021 Indianapolis 500 and multiple Rolex 24 At Daytona titles, MSR is a powerhouse in both open-wheel and endurance sports car racing.

column_values.long_text_Mjj24ZDl: SOLACE Boats is a premium American boat builder redefining the center console by combining offshore fishing performance with luxury cruising in a single platform. Known for advanced hull design, smooth ride quality, and high-end fit and finish, SOLACE boats are built to handle serious offshore conditions while delivering the comfort, technology, and social space expected from a luxury dayboat. Their lineup (from the versatile 28 HCS to the flagship 42CS) caters to experienced boaters seeking one boat that can fish, entertain, and cruise without compromise.
column_values.long_text9qcmxe7t: The target demographic for SOLACE Boats is affluent, experience-driven boaters—typically professionals, entrepreneurs, and executives in their late 30s to 60s—who want a single, high-performance vessel that supports both offshore fishing and luxury leisure. These buyers often have household incomes of $250K+ (many $500K+), value premium craftsmanship and design, and prioritize versatility, status, and ease of use. They are socially active (sandbars, waterfront dining, entertaining guests) but still want the capability to run offshore confidently, making them ideal for a hybrid platform that delivers both performance and lifestyle without compromise. Must cater to a mix of female and male buyers.

Primo Yachts was envisioned with a fresh, thoughtful approach to Boating and Boat Ownership; one designed to make the entire process of buying and owning a yacht more enjoyable and genuinely rewarding.

Founded by industry veterans with over 50 years of combined experience, Primo blends the comprehensive insight of a longtime yacht owner with the expertise of a Veteran Captain and Broker - Creating an experience that feels straightforward, engaging, and refreshingly personal.

MUSIC: (Presented and confirmed this with Ashley) -
Let’s lean into WPR’s artistic energy with music that reflects its modern, elevated, and creative vibe. Genres like progressive house (e.g. KAYTRANADA, TYCHO) or jazz fusion (e.g. YUSSEF DAYES, ALFA MIST) offer depth, while Latin pop or hip-hop influences can ground us in Miami’s cultural roots.

We can also align each content pillar from the strategy deck with a sonic direction:

1. Wellness-First Lifestyle
Vibe: calming, intentional, soft luxury with a pulse
Genres: chill electronic, ambient, neo-soul, jazz fusion
Artists/Tracks:
– Tycho – "Awake"
– FKJ – "Skyline"
– Jordan Rakei – "Add the Baseline"
– Sofi Tukker – "Luna"
– Emancipator – "Minor Cause"

2. Intentional & Meticulous Design
Vibe: architectural beauty, refined creativity
Genres: jazz-electronic fusion, minimal house, ambient
Artists/Tracks:
– Bonobo – "Cirrus"
– Stimming – "Window"
– Nils Frahm – "Says"
– Yotto – "Fire Walk"
– BADBADNOTGOOD – "Time Moves Slow"

3. Amenities & Elevated Interiors
Vibe: modern elegance, boutique hotel luxury
Genres: nu-disco, house-lounge, soulful funk
Artists/Tracks:
– Kaytranada – "You're the One"
– Tom Misch – "Movie"
– ODESZA – "A Moment Apart"
– Poolside – "Do You Believe"
– Cory Henry – "Happy Days"

Miami Cultural Layer
Add local texture while keeping upscale energy:
– Bomba Estéreo – "To My Love (Tainy Remix)"
– Buscabulla – "NTE"
– Sofía Kourtesis – "Estación Esperanza"
– Rosalía – "Bizcochito"
– Polo & Pan – "Canopée"
